creator: gabor@acm.org
text:
`whereis' and `manpath' both produce:
	Warning: couldn't stat file /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.00502/man!

Fix: 

Remove line from manpath.config.sample:
	MANDATORY_MANPATH	/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.00502/man

	(Alternatively add perl5 to standard distribution.  I remember
	this being somewhat of a hot topic.)
How-To-Repeat: 
	Obvious.
